# Pheak Meas — Product Designer & Founder

> 18 years shipping product design across fintech, developer tools, and AI-native products. Co-founded a fintech company from 3-person startup to TSX-V public company.

## About
- Founder + senior product designer, 18 years experience
- Co-founder and Head of Product Design at Katipult (TSX-V public fintech)
- Scaled the design practice from solo founder-designer to leading the team at a 45-person public company
- Currently designing AI-native products at MZM Labs
- **Available for senior product design roles** as of April 2026

## Domain expertise
- Fintech (KYC/AML, investor onboarding, compliance flows)
- Developer tools and AI-native products
- 0→1 product launches and scale-stage redesigns
- Design systems and design tokens
- Cross-functional leadership

## Case studies
- [Compliance UX — KYC redesign that beat the 65% industry drop-off benchmark](/case-study/compliance-ux/)
- [DealFlow — Katipult investor onboarding redesign](/case-study/dealflow/)
- [AKMSecure — security software product design](/case-study/akmsecure/)
- [Docs to Design — design tooling product](/case-study/docs-to-design/)
- [Donations & Rewards — engagement platform](/case-study/donations-rewards/)
- [FuzeHQ — agent orchestration SaaS](/case-study/fuzehq/)
- [IsoBlock — product platform](/case-study/isoblock/)
- [Lending — fintech lending platform](/case-study/lending/)
- [MockupKit — Figma plugin for device mockups](/case-study/mockupkit/)
- [MultiPaste — productivity tool](/case-study/multipaste/)
- [MyPick.io — visual elimination race game](/case-study/mypick/)
- [RelationSync — wellness/journaling app](/case-study/relationsync/)
